title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Usopp, Unknown person #14, Luffy, Nami, Unknown person #15 as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: way to state the obvious, say it then!! I'm pissed off right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your captain!! He says he'll beat master kaidou...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm sorry!! He's just an idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So please... don't head- butt me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Please, we'll even leave this island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say that your captain will never become the "pirate King"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've already come so far!!! Be tactful or you'll really lose your life!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's how it is you say!? Then die now!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
